name: 5k!!! Discord Server
description:
5000 follower + a Discord Server!

Hello!

This is just a general update + thank you all for following!

So, we hit the big 5k! Seems like such a crazy number. I remember thinking 1k was impossible!

Not to be too sentimental, but it is very rare I stick with a hobby this long. Normally I ditch it in a month, but I've had a blast making bots, talking to other creators, and talking to y'all in the reviews! My join date says early march, but I actually didn't post until mid April, I think? I never would've thought, back when I was saying 1k was impossible, that I'd hit 5k before my year anniversary!

Seriously, I can't thank y'all enough for how much fun this site is.

Discord Server

I tend not to make bots for milestones, as I feel like people think they're a it annoying? But this isn't just a milestone bot, because this also serves as the introduction for my server! I feel like everyone has one nowadays, so ig it's finally a good as time as any.

...this server has definitely not been basically complete since early feburary. Oops.

This server is primarily set up to just be a place to 1) get pinged when I release new bots and 2) Just be a very casual place to chat with y'all. Depending on interest, we may do events and such later on.

Now, there is a catch: This server requires age verification in the form of ID, OR in the form of verification on other servers.

You only need to show the birthdate part of your ID, everything else MUST be blurred/ out!

I know, I know. It sucks to have jump through hoops, but I want a safe space for everyone, and that involves making sure no nsfw content is discussed around minors. This was the biggest thing stopping me from creating a server, but I just couldn't think of any other way to ensure everyone's safety.

Join us in Oblivion!

...I really, really hope this server works. I've never made one, so uh. First time for everything I guess!
creator: obliviousoblivion
